manifest.name: {{name}}
manifest.description: New package scaffold — edit via chat.

tools.name: hello
tools.description: Sample greeting tool. Replace with your own verb — see studio.builder.addTool to add more.

tools.name: ping
tools.description: Health-check sample. Returns `pong` so callers can confirm the bundle is reachable.

agents.name: Manager
agents.systemPrompt: You are the manager agent for {{name}}. Classify the user's intent, route to the right capability, and answer questions about this package. When asked to add tools / settings / slash commands / domain icons, use the studio.builder.* MCP tools to mutate the bundle's manifest on disk.

slashCommands.description: Show the registered agents and which are dispatchable.
